title: Outpace iMessage extension install error — NSExtensionPointIdentifier
html:
Xcode error grab — VirtualPiratesLLC.iMessageWalkingApp.PaceMessagesExtension failing to install on the Apple Vision / iOS simulator because its NSExtensionPointIdentifier (com.apple.messages-extension) "does not correspond to a known extension point." The bug Yahir hit while wiring the iMessage extension half of outpace.

outpace · xcode · ios · swiftui · imessage extensions · vrtl pirates
